message:
🌱 Add node-exporter: node_exporter 1.5.0 release SIGKILL immediately on macOS mission (#1751)

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "node-exporter-2539-node-exporter-1-5-0-release-sigkill-immediately-on-macos-m1-a",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "node-exporter: node_exporter 1.5.0 release SIGKILL immediately on macOS M1/arm64",
+    "description": "node_exporter 1.5.0 release SIGKILL immediately on macOS M1/arm64. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current node-exporter deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your node-exporter version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nhelm list -n node-exporter 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working node-exporter installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review node-exporter configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant node-exporter configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get configmap -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=node-exporter\n```\n### Host operating system: output of `uname -a`\n\n```\n$ uname -a\nDarwin Peters-MBP-2.cust.communityfibre.co.uk 21.6.0 Darwin Kernel Version 21.6.0: Mon Aug 22 2052 PDT 2022; root:xnu-8020.140.49~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000 arm64\n```\n\n### node_exporter"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for node_exporter 1.5.0 release SIGKILL immediately on macOS…",
+        "description": "Is this the same issue as #2217?\n\nThere is something node exporter specific going on here. Comparing with the statsd exporter (released both before and after node exporter 1.5.0):\n\n```terminal\n❯ codesign -vvv node_exporter\nnode_exporter: valid on disk\nnode_exporter: satisfies its Designated\n```yaml\n$ uname -a\nDarwin Peters-MBP-2.cust.communityfibre.co.uk 21.6.0 Darwin Kernel Version 21.6.0: Mon Aug 22 20:19:52 PDT 2022; root:xnu-8020.140.49~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000 arm64\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get events -n node-exporter --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"node_exporter 1.5.0 release SIGKILL immediately on macOS…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Is this the same issue as #2217?\n\nThere is something node exporter specific going on here.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ uname -a\nDarwin Peters-MBP-2.cust.communityfibre.co.uk 21.6.0 Darwin Kernel Version 21.6.0: Mon Aug 22 20:19:52 PDT 2022; root:xnu-8020.140.49~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000 arm64",
+        "pete at Peters-MBP-2 in ~/src/ef/_ (pete-node-exporter●)\n$ uname -psm\nDarwin arm64 arm\n\npete at Peters-MBP-2 in ~/src/ef/_ (pete-node-exporter●)\n$ curl --location https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/download/v1.5.0/node_exporter-1.5.0.darwin-arm64.tar.gz | tar xz\n  % Total    % Received % Xferd  Average Speed   Time    Time     Time  Current\n                                 Dload  Upload   Total   Spent    Left  Speed\n  0     0    0     0    0     0      0      0 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:--     0\n100 4411k  100 4411k    0     0  9061k      0 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:-- 15.0M\n\npete at Peters-MBP-2 in ~/src/ef/_ (pete-node-exporter●)\n$ ./node_exporter-1.5.0.darwin-arm64/node_exporter --help\n[1]    33812 killed     ./node_exporter-1.5.0.darwin-arm64/node_exporter --help",
+        "node_exporter % codesign -vvvv node_exporter\nnode_exporter: valid on disk\nnode_exporter: satisfies its Designated Requirement"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
